notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core callback bridge routes normal text messages to flow.input only when the canary admin has an active Core flow on input_title or input_url.
Core section audit matrix now classifies all sections: channels, comments, buttons, lead_magnets, moderation, archive, stats, settings.
Stats, moderation, archive, comments and settings are intentionally read-only/audit on this step; dangerous write actions remain disabled.
Core buttons.home intentionally uses only clean storage table ak_post_buttons.
Legacy ak_comment_banners_v3 was identified diagnostically but is not a Core working adapter and is ignored by future architecture.
New CTA/button creation flow starts from Core buttons.add, selects a post, accepts title and URL, then saves to ak_post_buttons via postAddonManager.addButton.
This build only saves clean Core data; it does not patch MAX posts yet.
